data.title: Ethereum Trader Achieves Top Position with Significant Gains
data.description: On April 30, a prominent Ethereum trader has reportedly achieved substantial profits through strategic trading activities. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the trader, known for previously accumulating long positions totaling 120,000 ETH, has seen significant gains over the past two months. The trader's two addresses have recently increased their holdings, now managing a position valued at $182 million, with an entry price of $2,265 per ETH. The current floating profit stands at $514,000, making it the top position on Hyperliquid ETH.

data.title: Polymarket TVL Reaches Record High of $537 Million
data.description: DefiLlama data reveals that Polymarket's total value locked (TVL) has surpassed $537 million, marking a new all-time high. According to Odaily, the platform's fee revenue over the past seven days has exceeded $8 million.

data.title: Tian Neng Power Shares Drop Over 22% in Hong Kong
data.description: Tian Neng Power (00819.HK) shares fell more than 22% at the start of trading in Hong Kong. According to Jin10, the company recently disclosed that Tian Neng's first-quarter net profit attributable to shareholders was 75.084 million yuan, marking a year-on-year decrease of 82.14%.

data.title: Binance Margin to Update Interest Calculation Method for Loans
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to revise its interest calculation method for Margin Loans, effective from 2026-04-30 08:00 (UTC). This change aims to enhance clarity and align interest charges more closely with the actual borrowing time. Users are advised to review the updated rules and plan their borrowing and trading activities accordingly.

The key modification involves the first interest charge for a new Margin Loan, which will now be calculated on a prorated basis. This calculation will consider the actual time elapsed between the fund borrowing time and the next hourly settlement time. Specifically, interest will begin accruing immediately upon loan creation. For the initial interest period, the charge will be computed proportionally based on the exact number of seconds from the borrowing time to the subsequent hourly calculation time. The formula for this calculation is: First interest = Principal amount * Hourly interest rate * (Actual seconds / 3,600).

Following the first interest period, interest will continue to accrue hourly on a standard schedule until the loan is fully repaid. For example, if a user borrows 10,000 USDT at 2026-04-30 05:30:49 (UTC) with an hourly interest rate of 0.0004%, the new rule calculates the interest as 0.01945556 USDT for the first period, compared to 0.04 USDT under the old rule. The next hourly interest calculation will occur at 2026-04-30 06:00:00 (UTC), with subsequent interest accruing on a full-hour basis for each hourly period.

data.title: A whale added approximately 80,000 ETH to its long positions, bringing its total position to $182 million.
data.description: According to crypto analyst Ai (@ai_9684xtpa), a trader who previously held a long position of approximately 120,000 ETH has recently increased their holdings, now holding about 80,000 ETH in long positions, with a total position size of approximately $182 million. The average opening price was approximately $2,265, and the current unrealized profit is approximately $514,000. This position has become one of the largest ETH positions on the Hyperliquid platform.

data.title: Hong Kong's New Consumer Sector Shows Mixed Performance
data.description: Hong Kong's new consumer sector experienced mixed performance today. According to Jin10, Shanghai Auntie (02589.HK) saw a significant increase of over 10%. Other stocks such as Cha Bai Dao (02555.HK), Guo Quan (02517.HK), and Mixue Group (02097.HK) also recorded gains. However, stocks like Blokko (00325.HK), Gu Ming (01364.HK), and Pop Mart (09992.HK) showed weaker performance.

data.title: Polymarket TVL surpasses $530 million, setting a new record.
data.description: According to DefiLlama data, Polymarket TVL surpassed $530 million, reaching $5.37, a record high. Furthermore, the platform's transaction fee revenue over the past 7 days exceeded $8 million.

data.title: New Address Accumulates 40,000 ETH, Possibly Linked to Bitmine
data.description: In the past 24 hours, a new address has accumulated 40,000 ETH, raising speculation about its association with Bitmine. Analyst @ai_9684xtpa posted on X. The address, identified as 0x448…aD525, withdrew ETH valued at $90.64 million in two transactions from FalconX, with an average withdrawal price of approximately $2,266. Based on the withdrawal amount and source, it is speculated that the address may be linked to Bitmine.

data.title: Brother Machi's long positions were partially liquidated again, resulting in a loss of nearly $4 million this week.
data.description: According to on-chain data, whale Maji suffered further forced liquidation of some of its long positions during the market correction, turning a profit into a loss for the week. It reduced some of its ETH and BTC long positions during the overnight market decline, but some positions were still forcibly liquidated. Data shows that its current total holdings are approximately $30 million, with the ETH position liquidated at $2197 and the BTC position liquidated at $72194.1.

data.title: A WLFI-affiliated address sold 8,500 ETH at an average price of approximately $2,268.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, an address associated with World Liberty Financial (WLFI) sold 8,500 ETH at approximately $2,268 per ETH eight hours ago, receiving approximately $19.27 million in USDC. The address subsequently repaid all loans and withdrew all funds from Aave.

data.title: Legend Secures $3.5 Million in Seed Funding Led by Electric Capital
data.description: Legend has successfully raised $3.5 million in a seed funding round, with Electric Capital leading the investment. According to NS3.AI, Amber Group and GSR also participated in the round, increasing Legend's total funding to $5 million. This financial boost is expected to support Legend's growth and development in the competitive market.

data.title: Australia's Private Sector Loans Rise in March
data.description: Australia's private sector loans increased by 0.7% in March, surpassing expectations of a 0.60% rise, according to Jin10. The previous month's growth rate was also recorded at 0.60%.

data.title: Australia's Export Price Index Growth Slows in Q1
data.description: Australia's export price index for the first quarter recorded a quarterly growth of 0.5%, according to Jin10. This figure fell short of the expected 1.8% and was significantly lower than the previous quarter's growth of 3.20%.

data.title: Polymarket Predicts Low Probability of Powell Leaving Fed Board by May 30
data.description:
According to Odaily, the probability of U.S. Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell stepping down from the Fed Board by May 30 has significantly decreased to 9%, marking a 25% drop in the past 24 hours. Additionally, the likelihood of Powell leaving the board by December 31 has fallen to 66%, an 11% decrease over the same period.

The contract rules for this event specify that if Powell is no longer a member of the Federal Reserve Board at any time before 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time on the target date, the outcome will be considered 'yes.' Otherwise, it will be 'no.' If Powell steps down as chairman but remains on the board, it does not meet the criteria for a 'yes' outcome. The determination is based on information released by the U.S. government, though consensus from credible reports can also serve as a basis.

In a press conference this morning, Powell stated that he would continue to serve as a Fed board member "for a while" after stepping down as chairman and promised to "remain low-key." U.S. Treasury Secretary Besant commented that Powell's decision to stay on the board would be unusual, noting that it contradicts traditional norms for someone who has consistently emphasized regulation.

data.title: Sources: The Trump administration has informed Anthropic that it opposes expanding access to the Mythos model.
data.description: According to the Wall Street Journal: Sources revealed that the Trump administration informed Anthropic that it opposes expanding access to the Mythos model. (Jinshi)

data.title: Polymarket's probability that Powell will step down from his position as a Federal Reserve governor before May 30 has dropped to 9%, a 25% decrease in the past 24 hours.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer's monitoring, the probability of Powell stepping down from the Federal Reserve Board of Governors before May 30th has plummeted on Polymarket, now down to 9%, a 25% drop in 24 hours; the probability of Powell stepping down from the Federal Reserve Board of Governors before December 31st has fallen to 66%, an 11% drop in 24 hours. The contract rules for this event are: if Federal Reserve Chairman Powell ceases to be a member of the Federal Reserve Board of Governors at any time during the specified period (11:59 PM Eastern Time), it will be judged as "yes"; otherwise, it will be judged as "no". If Powell ceases to be Federal Reserve Chairman but remains a member of the Federal Reserve Board of Governors, the "yes" condition is not met. The judgment is based on information released by the US government, but consensus from credible reports can also be used as a basis. At a press conference this morning, Powell stated that he would continue to serve as a Federal Reserve Governor "for some time" after stepping down as Chairman and pledged to "keep a low profile." U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessant responded, "It would be extraordinary if Powell remained a Federal Reserve Governor; for someone who has always emphasized norms, his unilateral decision would go against tradition." Odaily Seer continues to focus on predicting the market, seeing changes before pricing them in.

data.title: An account with over $1.7 million in profits purchased $300,000 worth of shares in Game 5 of the Western Conference First Round of the NBA Playoffs, in which the Rockets defeated the Lakers.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer's monitoring, in Polymarket's "NBA Western Conference First Round Game 5 Rockets vs. Lakers" prediction event, an account (0x8c80d213c0cbad777d06ee3f58f6ca4bc03102c3) with a profit exceeding $1.7 million purchased $300,000 worth of shares betting on the Rockets to defeat the Lakers. The average opening price was 39.9¢, and the current price is 40.5¢, resulting in a floating loss of approximately $46 million. The Rockets lead the series 1-3 in the NBA Western Conference First Round, with Game 5 scheduled for 10:00 AM Beijing time today. Reports indicate that Lakers star Luka Doncic will miss the initial stages of the second round, and his return timeline remains unclear. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, anticipating changes before prices are set.

data.title: Most crypto stocks closed lower on the US stock market, with HOOD falling more than 13.24%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the close of trading on the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 0.57%, the S&P 500 fell 0.04%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 0.04%. Most crypto stocks weakened, with HOOD falling over 13.24%, HODL falling 15.96%, Coinbase falling 6.37%, MSTR falling 4.54%, and SBET falling 4.24%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Gold rose to $4,565, volatility decreased, and crude oil fell.
data.description: According to the latest data from Gate, gold prices rose to $4,565.28 per ounce, a daily increase of 0.47%. Silver prices rose to $72.165 per ounce, a daily increase of 1.24%. The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 41.40, a daily decrease of 1.43%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 59.04, a daily increase of 0.92%. In the foreign exchange market, the USD/CNH exchange rate fell 0.05% to 6.84272. The USD/JPY exchange rate fell 0.18% to 160.142. In global stock indices, the Euro Stoxx 50 fell 0.75% to 5,789.75 points; the UK FTSE 100 rose 0.14% to 10,210.64 points; and the German DAX 40 rose 0.24% to 23,894.85 points. In commodities, WTI crude oil fell 1.29% to $109.39 per barrel, and Brent crude oil fell 0.78% to $116.85 per barrel. Gate allows users to directly trade traditional financial market products on its platform, providing a one-stop solution for precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration of crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi features have been fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to easily participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities outside the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.
